hooks.command:
node -e "let d='';process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8');process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=(j.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(/crates/(agent-risk|pipeline|api)/src//.test(f)||/bins/feynman-engine/src//.test(f)){process.stderr.write('
\x1b[33m⚠️  RISK/EXECUTION CODE\x1b[0m
Pre-gate: Decimal math? fail-fast on invalid input? dryRun guard? idempotent submission? error propagation? per-agent isolation?
Run /hostile-review before finalizing.
');}}catch(e){}});"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8');process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(j.tool_input||{}).command||'';const out=JSON.stringify(j.tool_response||'');const isTest=/cargo test|make quick|make check/.test(cmd);const isFail=/FAILED|test result: FAILED|panicked/.test(out);if(isTest&&isFail){process.stderr.write('\n\x1b[31m✗ TEST FAILURE\x1b[0m — Extract root cause to memory/anti-patterns.md before fixing.\n');}}catch(e){}});"
